# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

kong_databases = {
  redis = {
    host = "redis-host"
    port = 6379
    password = "redis-password"
    db = 0
  }
}

admin_listen       = 8443
admin_ssl           = true
admin_ssl_certificate = /etc/kong/ssl/kong.pem
admin_ssl_key = /etc/kong/ssl/kong-key.pem

api_listening_port = 8001

service {
  name = "my-service"
}

consumer {
  username = "my-consumer-username"
  password = "my-consumer-password"
}

plugin {
  id = "access-token-auth"
  strip_path = false
}

route {
  host = "my-api.com"
  path = "/"
  strippath = false
  service = "my-service"
  consumer = "my-consumer-username"
  tls_offload = true

  plugins {
    id = "access-token-auth"
  }
}
